title: zerna unioloides
intro: Zerna unioloides, also known as the Borneo camphor tree, is a species of tree native to the tropical forests of Borneo. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, due to the presence of camphor and other essential oils. The health benefits of Zerna unioloides include relieving pain, reducing inflammation, and treating skin conditions such as acne and eczema. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the tree are often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
